title: Building an AI LMS with Devin
tagline: A live case study — how Dr. Freedom Cheteni and Devin built sof.ai, in real time, as the curriculum.
description: This isn't a simulation. Every module corresponds to a real PR, a real decision, and a real lesson Dr. Freedom learned while building this school with Devin as his pair. By the end you'll have shipped your own scaffolded app, added your first AI feature, deployed a backend, and run a user-feedback loop — just like the one that built sof.ai itself.
